zh.lifeSummary: 當Helena, Queen of Sweden於大約1065年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉時，她的父親King Torild Torildsson41歲，母親Cecelia37歲。她和Inge Stenkilsson至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1140年在瑞典額斯特格特藍德福利塔享年77歲，埋葬在瑞典額斯特格特藍德福利塔 可洛斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helena, Queen of Sweden于大约1065年出生在瑞典烏普薩拉时，她的父亲King Torild Torildsson41岁，母亲Cecelia37岁。她和Inge Stenkilsson至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1140年在瑞典額斯特格特藍德福利塔享年77岁，埋葬在瑞典額斯特格特藍德福利塔 可洛斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Helena,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

nameMeanings.name: Queen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Quene, sometimes a pet form of Quenill (Old English Cwēnhild, from cwēn ‘queen’ + hild ‘battle’). Early examples of the name are mainly from southern England, especially Sussex, but its currency in late medieval northern England has also been suggested by records from Yorkshire.
English: possibly a nickname from Middle English quene ‘woman; harlot; crone’ (Old English cwēn), but this is less likely than 2 to have given rise to a hereditary surname.

variants.name: McQueen
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Shuibhne ‘son of Suibhne’ a byname meaning ‘pleasant’. Compare McSweeney .

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Shuain, a Gaelic patronymic based on Old Norse sveinn ‘boy, servant’, which was also used as a personal name (see Swain ). This is given as the origin of the McQueen or McSwan family of Skye, although the spellings are hard to distinguish. Compare Whan .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Sweden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van Sweeden): variant of Van Zweeden, a habitational name for someone from Sweden.
Probably also an altered form of Norwegian   Sween   or possibly Irish   Sweeten  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sween
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McSween  .

historicEvents.title: Vreta Abbey is First Christian Convent
historicEvents.description: Vreta Abbey was established around 1100 and was the first Christian convent in Sweden. It was located in modern-day Linkoping Municipality. It was founded on orders of Pope Paschal II with large donations by King Inge the Elder and Queen Helena.

en.lifeSummary: When Helena, Queen of Sweden was born about 1065, in Uppsala, Sweden, her father, King Torild Torildsson, was 41 and her mother, Cecelia, was 37. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Inge Stenkilsson. She died about 1140, in Vreta, Östergötland, Sweden, at the age of 77, and was buried in Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helena, Queen of Sweden est née environ 1065, à Uppsala, Suède, son père, King Torild Torildsson, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Cecelia, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Inge Stenkilsson. Elle est décédée environ 1140, à Vreta, Östergötland, Suède, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helena, Queen of Sweden um 1065 in Uppsala, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Torild Torildsson 41 und ihre Mutter Cecelia 37. Sie hatte mit Inge Stenkilsson mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1140 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Vreta, Östergötland, Schweden und wurde in Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helena, Queen of Sweden è nata il circa 1065 nel Uppsala, Svezia, sua padre, King Torild Torildsson, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Cecelia, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Inge Stenkilsson. Morì circa 1140, nel Vreta, Östergötland, Svezia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Svezia.

ja.Uppsala, Stockholm, Sverige: スウェーデンストックhオルムウップサラ
ja.lifeSummary: Helena, Queen of Swedenが約1065年にスウェーデンウップサラで生まれた時，父King Torild Torildssonは41歳，母Ceceliaは37歳であった。彼女はInge Stenkilssonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1140年にスウェーデンoステルグoトランドvレタで77歳で死去し，スウェーデンoステルグoトランドvレタ クロスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Helena, Queen of Sweden(이)가 대략 1065년 스웨덴 업프사라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Torild Torildsson(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecelia(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Inge Stenkilsson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1140년 스웨덴 o스터그o틀랜드 브레타에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스웨덴 o스터그o틀랜드 브레타 클로스터에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1065–about 1140: tany ho any amin'ny 1065–tany ho any amin'ny 1140

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helena, Queen of Sweden nasceu aproximadamente 1065, em Uppsala, Suécia, seu pai, King Torild Torildsson, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Cecelia, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Inge Stenkilsson. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1140, em Vreta, Östergötland, Suécia, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helena, Queen of Sweden родилась около 1065 г. в местности уппсала, Швеция, её отцу по имени King Torild Torildsson было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Cecelia, 37. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Inge Stenkilsson. Она умерла около 1140 г. в местности врета, oстиргoтланд, Швеция в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности врета клостир, oстиргoтланд, Швеция.

sm.about 1065–about 1140: e tusa o le 1065–e tusa o le 1140

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helena, Queen of Sweden nació aproximadamente 1065, en Uppsala, Suecia, su papá, King Torild Torildsson, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Cecelia, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Inge Stenkilsson. Murió aproximadamente 1140, en Vreta, Östergötland, Suecia, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Suecia.
